seed_problem: frieze-band facade coloring (detect each band's frieze group, harmonize seams)
mutation: composite: score = (#distinct frieze signatures) x (sum of divisibility-gated seam harmonies) + distinct-tile count; seam harmony is realized only when neighboring orbit periods divide one another, coupling group diversity to stacking order
theme: stacked ornamental border bands on a facade
title: Polyphonic Facade Bands
innovation_hook: Seam harmony is gated by whether one band's orbit period divides its neighbor's, so ordering bands into a divisibility chain is the hidden structure that unlocks simultaneous group diversity AND harmony.
strategies: greedy: maximize seam harmony only -- one repeated period-1 tile on the best color pair; Groups=1 so the multiplier is wasted
diversity-blind: pick many distinct signatures but stack them in arbitrary order -> non-divisible neighbors zero out most seams

strong: SA co-search over period/tile/order/colors with a divisibility-reorder move -- thread diverse frieze groups onto a divisibility chain while landing scarce high-harmony pairs on compatible seams
